case_title: PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. MARCO TULLIO DE LA CRUZ ORTIZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,098.82 FILED BY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT DE LA CRUZ ORTIZ, MARCO TULLIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED SEP-18-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DE LA CRUZ ORTIZ, MARCO TULLIO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ--LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
